Prenatal

Best Prenatal Supplement Deals — Save on Needed & More

May 15, 2025 (Updated: June 5, 2025) #prenatal#supplements#pregnancy#needed#discount codes

Prenatal nutrition is one of the most important investments you can make for your baby’s development. Here are the best deals on premium prenatal supplements.

1. Needed — 20% Off First Order

Needed is a premium prenatal nutrition brand trusted by functional medicine doctors and OB-GYNs. Their complete prenatal packs include everything from folate to omega-3s.

Deal: 20% off your first order

Try Needed Prenatal

20% off your first order. Doctor-formulated prenatal nutrition.

Get 20% Off →

2. Equip Foods — 15% Off Prime Protein

Equip Foods offers clean, grass-fed beef protein isolate — perfect for pregnancy when protein needs increase significantly.

Deal: 15% off your first order

3. Beam — 20% Off Recovery & Wellness

Beam’s Dream Powder and Recover blends are great for prenatal sleep support and post-workout recovery during pregnancy.

Deal: 20% off your first order

Comparison Table

BrandDiscountBest ForKey Ingredient
Needed20% offComplete prenatalMethylfolate, DHA
Equip Foods15% offProteinGrass-fed beef isolate
Beam20% offSleep/RecoveryReishi, magnesium

Pro Tip

Start prenatal supplements at least 3 months before trying to conceive. Most prenatal experts recommend continuing through breastfeeding.
